text: Happy Birthday, Mom, it's your special day.
So here's a few words I'd love to say.
You've filled our lives with laughter and cheer,
And somehow get more amazing every year.
Your beef stew's famous. There's simply no doubt.
One taste and we're all asking, "Can I have more now?"
You keep us well fed with love in each bite,
Making every meal feel cozy and right.
For Ellie, it's smoothies mixed up with care,
And homemade popsicles always waiting there.
To my girls, you're Pau Pau, loving and fun,
The kind of grandma who's second to none.
We've danced with Lady Gaga, laughing all the while,
Then Peanuts with the Symphony brought every face a smile.
From sunny Maui to Benaroya Hall,
The best memories are the ones we share through it all.
Nora cruises your hallway in her little toy car,
Convinced she's already a NASCAR star.
Suki and Tater have life figured out too,
Because nobody spoils them quite like you.
So here's to more adventures, more music, more fun,
More family dinners enjoyed by everyone.
Happy 71st, Mom. We love you so much.
Our lives are brighter because of your love and your touch.
Happy Birthday, Mom. We love you!
Love,
Dana
